title: go-workflow Template
description: Schema for go-workflow native template JSON files. Reference via $schema key for IDE validation.

name.description: Template name. May contain {{param}} placeholders substituted at instantiation.

params.description: Parameter declarations. Values are either a string (legacy description) or a ParamSpec object.

oneOf.description: Legacy form: plain description string. Treated as type=string.

defaults.description: Default parameter values. Keys must match param names. Values must be coercible to the declared param type.

steps.description: Ordered list of template steps. Dependencies are declared via depends_on.

ParamSpec.description: Typed parameter declaration. Replaces the legacy string-description form.

type.description: Declared type. Used for coercion before substitution and load-time default validation.

default.description: Default value. Must be coercible to the declared type.

required.description: If true, instantiation fails when this param is not supplied and has no default.

enum.description: Allowed values. Not currently enforced at runtime (reserved for future validation).

TemplateStep.description: A single step in the template. Config values may contain {{param}} placeholders.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this template.

kind.description: Step type. Canonical: tool, llm, approval, condition, message, workflow, agent, transform, a2a, foreach, branchall, suspend, noop, image, vision. n8n aliases also accepted.

config.description: Step configuration. Schema varies by kind. Values may contain {{param}} placeholders.

depends_on.description: List of step IDs that must complete before this step runs.
